dashboard.label: Hitachi Block Storage Fleet Operations & Performance
dashboard.description: Fleet operations dashboard for Hitachi VSP arrays via VSP 360. KPIs, pool capacity trends (Used vs Subscribed TiB, Used% vs Sub Rate%), array IOPS and transfer rate, cache utilization and write pending by CLPR, MPB processor utilization, and port performance (IOPS, response time, utilization, transfer rate).
